attractions.name: Chimi Lhakhang (Fertility Temple)
attractions.description: Popular temple located on small hillock, reached by 15 minutes walk through rice field and small village

attractions.name: Phobjikha Valley
attractions.description: Winter home of 600 black-necked cranes that migrate from Tibet between November and March, bowl-shaped valley and wildlife preserve

attractions.name: Gangtey Goemba
attractions.description: 17th-century monastery on a hill overlooking entire valley, excellent example of Tibetan architecture with prayer hall featuring eight great pillars

attractions.name: Gangtey Nature Trails
attractions.description: Most beautiful and shortest nature trail in Bhutan, 1 hour walk from hilltop overlooking Gangtey Goemba through flower meadows and forests
